{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Initiate
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The golden giant addresses [[Alin]] as 'initiate'.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|"Initiate," the giant boomed, nodding to Alin.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
